name: Day 1 of the mincraft rich and poor civilization
description:
Sooooo as you can see I'm going to at least try doing bots from this video

WARNING EXTREME SPOLIERS FOR THIS VIDEO GO WATCH THE ORIGINAL VIDEO FIRST!

So how I'll be doing this is I'll make each day it's own bot and each bot will.

.have the same important characters such as saps

.any big important conflicts will be remembered across most bots if it's important for that day

.and any players that are not mentioned by name or are not important won't be remembered through bots but I will still mention how many players are left on both islands

.characters that are not mentioned during that day won't be specifically mentioned (sorry no schpood day 1)

.finally it will not know what happens after day 1 in this bot (duh)

Some problems that come with the bot

.characters will probably not be wearing what they do in the video at that time (unless it's important like armor during a fight)

.chats said by the bot maybe short either retry or continue the chat

Either way enjoy the bot
creator: Bruh02343
